mt103.js: var b103=''+stp.json(msg, 'B3/103', null);var b72 = String(b4.get('F72'));if(b103=='ZDS' && b72.substring(0,10)==='/REC/DTROF'){rule='pacs004.mt';} else if(b103=='SRS' && b72.substring(0,14)==='/CPL/3000/RETN'){rule='pacs004.mt';}else if (b72.substring(0,6)==='/REJT/') {rule='pacs002.mt103';}else if(b72.substring(0,6)==='/RETN/'){rule='pacs004.mt';} else if (stp.has(b4, 'SeqC')){rule='mt103.pacs008.ftl'; mx='pacs.008.001.04';} else {rule= 'pacs008.mt103'; mx='pacs.008.001.04'; }

mt202.js: var b103=''+stp.json(msg, 'B3/103', null);var b72 = String(b4.get('F72'));if(b103=='ZDS' && b72.substring(0,10)==='/REC/DTROF'){rule='pacs004.mt';} else if (b72.substring(0,6)==='/REJT/') {rule='pacs002.mt103';}else if(b72.substring(0,6)==='/RETN/') {rule='pacs004.mt';} else if (stp.has(b4, 'SeqC')){rule='mt103.pacs008.ftl'; mx='pacs.008.001.04';} else {rule= 'pacs009.mt202'; }

mt202.cov.js: var b103=''+stp.json(msg, 'B3/103', null);var b72 = ''+stp.json(b4, 'SeqB/F72', null);var a72 = String(b4.get('F72'));if(b103=='ZDS' && b72.substring(0,6)==='/REJT/'){rule='pacs004.mt';} else if (a72.substring(0,6)==='/REJT/') {rule='pacs002.mt103';}else if(a72.substring(0,6)==='/RETN/') {rule='pacs004.mt';} else {rule= 'pacs009.mt202cov';}
